# PRD: [Title]

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Author** | [Name] |
| **Date** | [YYYY-MM-DD] |
| **Status** | Draft / In Review / Approved / Shipped |
| **Stakeholders** | [Engineering, Design, Data, Commercial, etc.] |
| **Product Area** | Brand Integrations / Advertising / Both |

---

## 1. Background & Context

_Why does this matter now? What business context, user behaviour, or market shift makes this relevant? Reference any prior work, experiments, or data._

---

## 2. Problem Statement

_What specific problem are we solving? Who experiences it? What's the cost of not solving it?_

**Who**: [User segment / partner / internal team]
**Problem**: [Concrete description]
**Impact**: [Quantified where possible — lost revenue, poor conversion, user drop-off, partner churn]

---

## 3. Goal & Success Metrics

_What does success look like? Tie to TAVI / NSM where applicable._

| Metric | Current | Target | Measurement Method |
|---|---|---|---|
| [Primary metric] | [Baseline] | [Target] | [How measured] |
| [Secondary metric] | [Baseline] | [Target] | [How measured] |

**NSM Connection**: _How does this move OVU/1K EBU or AVU/1K EAU?_

---

## 4. Proposed Solution

_High-level description of the solution. What are we building and why this approach over alternatives?_

### 4a. Key Design Decisions

_What choices have been made and why. What was considered and rejected._

---

## 5. User Stories / Requirements

| # | As a... | I want to... | So that... | Priority |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | [role] | [action] | [outcome] | Must / Should / Could |
| 2 | | | | |

---

## 6. Scope

### In Scope
- [Feature / behaviour included]

### Out of Scope
- [What we're explicitly NOT doing and why]

### Future Considerations
- [Things we might do later, but not in this iteration]

---

## 7. Technical Considerations

_Architecture implications, data pipeline needs, third-party integrations, performance constraints._

---

## 8. Dependencies & Risks

| Dependency / Risk | Impact | Mitigation |
|---|---|---|
| [Description] | [High / Med / Low] | [Plan] |

---

## 9. Open Questions

- [ ] [Question that needs answering before or during implementation]
- [ ] [Question about edge cases, partner requirements, data availability]

---

## 10. Appendix

_Supporting data, mockups, wireframes, links to related documents._
